req.title: Appointment scheduling (negative)
req.statement: A patient shall schedule an appointment at least 24 hours in advance during provider's available slots. Negative paths including permission denial, missing mandatory elements, and conflicting state transitions must be tested.
error_pathways: 422 when slot unavailable or in past

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-074 mandates a 24-hour advance booking rule with valid provider slots. Key test dimensions are: (1) a well-formed future slot >24 h out (EP positive), (2) a slot in the past or <24 h window (NEG/BVA), (3) the exact 24-hour boundary from now (BVA), (4) booking a slot that is already taken (STC conflict state), and (5) a request missing a mandatory field (DT/NEG). Together these cover the positive path, the stated 422 error pathways, permission/state-conflict negatives, and boundary arithmetic required by the requirement statement.

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_valid_future_slot
preconditions: Patient is authenticated and session token is valid
Provider has an available slot starting at NOW+26h
No existing appointment conflicts for that patient/provider pair
actions: Capture HTTP response status and body
trace: R-HLT-074: slot must be available and in future (>24 h)
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_valid_future_slot(auth_client, provider_slot_factory, notification_log):
    slot_start = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=26)
    slot = provider_slot_factory(start=slot_start, duration_minutes=30)

    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": slot["provider_id"],
        "slot_id": slot["slot_id"],
        "slot_start": slot_start.isoformat()
    }

    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)

    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert "id" in body
    assert body["status"] == "booked"
    assert notification_log.was_notified(provider_id=slot["provider_id"], appointment_id=body["id"])

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_slot_in_past_returns_422
preconditions: Patient is authenticated and session token is valid
A slot record exists in the system with start time = NOW-1h (past slot)
actions: Capture HTTP response status and error body
expected: Response body contains error code SLOT_IN_PAST or equivalent
No appointment record created in database
trace: R-HLT-074: error pathway — slot in past must return 422
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_slot_in_past_returns_422(auth_client, past_slot_factory, appointment_repo):
    slot_start = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(hours=1)
    slot = past_slot_factory(start=slot_start)

    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": slot["provider_id"],
        "slot_id": slot["slot_id"],
        "slot_start": slot_start.isoformat()
    }

    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)

    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert "error" in body
    assert appointment_repo.count_by_slot(slot["slot_id"]) == 0

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_exactly_24h_boundary_accepted
preconditions: Patient is authenticated and session token is valid
Provider has an available slot at exactly NOW+24h+30s (just inside the 24-hour boundary)
actions: Capture HTTP response status and body
expected: Slot is marked unavailable after booking
trace: R-HLT-074: BVA on the 24-hour advance rule — on-boundary valid value
R-HLT-074: appointment created when slot is exactly at the open boundary
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_exactly_24h_boundary_accepted(auth_client, provider_slot_factory, slot_repo):
    slot_start = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=24, seconds=30)
    slot = provider_slot_factory(start=slot_start, duration_minutes=30)

    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": slot["provider_id"],
        "slot_id": slot["slot_id"],
        "slot_start": slot_start.isoformat()
    }

    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)

    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["status"] == "booked"
    assert slot_repo.is_unavailable(slot["slot_id"])

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_just_under_24h_boundary_rejected
preconditions: Patient is authenticated and session token is valid
A slot record exists at NOW+24h-30s (just outside the 24-hour boundary)
actions: Capture HTTP response status and error body
expected: Error body references advance-booking time constraint
trace: R-HLT-074: BVA — off-by-one below 24-hour threshold must be rejected
R-HLT-074: 422 error pathway for insufficient advance notice
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_just_under_24h_boundary_rejected(auth_client, past_slot_factory, appointment_repo):
    slot_start = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=24) - timedelta(seconds=30)
    slot = past_slot_factory(start=slot_start)

    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": slot["provider_id"],
        "slot_id": slot["slot_id"],
        "slot_start": slot_start.isoformat()
    }

    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)

    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert "advance" in body.get("error", "").lower() or "time" in body.get("error", "").lower()
    assert appointment_repo.count_by_slot(slot["slot_id"]) == 0

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_already_booked_slot_returns_422
preconditions: Slot S at NOW+26h is already in state 'booked' by another patient
Patient B is authenticated as auth_client
actions: POST /appointments by Patient B targeting the already-booked slot S
Capture HTTP response status and error body
expected: Error body contains SLOT_UNAVAILABLE or equivalent conflict code
Original booking for Patient A remains unchanged
trace: R-HLT-074: conflicting state transition — slot already booked
R-HLT-074: negative path for conflicting state transitions
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_already_booked_slot_returns_422(auth_client, pre_booked_slot, appointment_repo):
    slot = pre_booked_slot  # fixture returns slot already booked by another patient

    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": slot["provider_id"],
        "slot_id": slot["slot_id"],
        "slot_start": slot["start"]
    }

    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)

    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert "unavailable" in body.get("error", "").lower() or "conflict" in body.get("error", "").lower()
    assert appointment_repo.count_by_slot(slot["slot_id"]) == 1  # only original booking exists

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_missing_mandatory_field_returns_422
preconditions: Patient is authenticated and session token is valid
A valid future slot exists at NOW+26h
actions: Capture HTTP response status and validation error body
expected: Error body identifies provider_id as missing or required
trace: R-HLT-074: missing mandatory element negative path
R-HLT-074: DT — decision table row where provider_id condition is FALSE
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_missing_mandatory_field_returns_422(auth_client, provider_slot_factory, appointment_repo):
    slot_start = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=26)
    slot = provider_slot_factory(start=slot_start, duration_minutes=30)

    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        # provider_id intentionally omitted
        "slot_id": slot["slot_id"],
        "slot_start": slot_start.isoformat()
    }

    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)

    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    errors = body.get("errors", body.get("error", ""))
    assert "provider_id" in str(errors).lower()
    assert appointment_repo.count_by_slot(slot["slot_id"]) == 0
